speaker: charlie
text: So there you have it Queensland - from life-saving medical breakthroughs to clean energy smashing records, young athletes lifting incredible weights, and climate action that's actually making a difference. Not a bad day's work for planet Earth really.

speaker: alice
text: It really shows what's possible when brilliant people put their minds to solving problems doesn't it? Whether it's Colombian diplomats getting countries to ditch fossil fuels or scientists figuring out how to stop bleeding in seconds, there's so much innovation happening.

speaker: charlie
text: And that warm autumn weather Sam mentioned is perfect for getting outside and appreciating all the good stuff happening around us. Sometimes we get so caught up in doom and gloom we forget how much progress is actually being made every single day.

speaker: alice
text: Absolutely! Keep that optimism going Queensland, share some good news with someone today, and remember - the world's full of people doing amazing things. We're back tomorrow with more bright side stories from around the globe.

speaker: charlie
text: From all of us here at ParkSyde Bright Side, thanks for tuning in and have a brilliant Wednesday. Until tomorrow, keep looking on the bright side!
